test.note: No dedicated test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml; build was used as the available full-suite validator.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce `agent-browser` evidence for UI-affecting fullstack fixes and treat missing evidence as procedure drift in review synthesis.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix feature `fix-pillar-init-and-cache-scoping` touched UI-affecting component behavior but the worker transcript skeleton has no `agent-browser` usage (`hasAgentBrowser: false`) while fullstack-worker procedure requires UI/manual validation.
